     3Рєњ  GVL_HMI.st Рђћ HMI Interface (K Area) Global Variable List

    11Рєњ
    12Рєњ  Note: K-area is the HMI (touch panel) interface area in LS PLC.
    13Рєњ        K001xx = touch switch inputs from HMI to PLC.
    14Рєњ        K002xx = unit semi-auto / home position touch switches.
    15Рєњ        _K00140~_K00157 = feeder ON/OFF touch switches.
    16Рєњ        K011xx = touch lamp outputs from PLC to HMI.
    17Рєњ        Variable names retain K-address format for direct traceability.

    11Рєњ
    12Рєњ  IEC 61131-3 mapping:
    13Рєњ    XG5000 TON Txxxx Рєњ TON function block instance
    14Рєњ    Usage in program:
    15Рєњ      _T0001(IN := condition, PT := T#500ms);
    16Рєњ      IF _T0001.Q THEN ... END_IF;
    17Рєњ
    18Рєњ  Note: XEC-DN64H supports IEC standard TON/TOF/TP function blocks.
    19Рєњ        Original XG5000 timer base is 10ms (default). PT values must be

    21Рєњ        program code.

     2Рєњ(* PROGRAM: ST_04_OUTPUT                                       *)
     3Рєњ(* DESC:    Output mapping Рђћ M internal relays -> P physical   *)
     4Рєњ(*          solenoid / actuator outputs                        *)
     5Рєњ(* SOURCE:  04_OUTPUT.txt (XG5000 mnemonic)                    *)
     6Рєњ(* TARGET:  XEC IEC 61131-3 Structured Text                    *)
     7Рєњ(* DATE:    2026-03-16                                         *)
     8Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
     9Рєњ
    10РєњPROGRAM ST_04_OUTPUT
    11Рєњ
    12РєњVAR
    13Рєњ    TON_T0014  : TON;   (* stop confirmation delay 5 ms *)
    14Рєњ    TON_T0030  : TON;   (* spring feeder gate delay *)
    15Рєњ    TON_T0070  : TON;   (* spring-0.15 feeder ON timer _D00278 ms *)
    16Рєњ    TON_T0071  : TON;   (* spring-0.23 feeder ON timer _D00378 ms *)
    17Рєњ    TON_T0072  : TON;   (* spring-0.15 sensor filter _D00279 ms *)
    18Рєњ    TON_T0073  : TON;   (* spring-0.23 sensor filter _D00379 ms *)
    19Рєњ    TON_T0074  : TON;   (* grease nozzle output delay 4 ms *)
    20Рєњ    TON_T0080  : TON;   (* servo ready output delay *)
    21Рєњ    TON_T0089  : TON;   (* servo ready short delay *)
    22Рєњ    TON_T0299  : TON;   (* spring-0.15 ejector timer 1 ms *)
    23Рєњ    TON_T0399  : TON;   (* spring-0.23 ejector timer 1 ms *)
    24Рєњ
    25Рєњ    (* edge detection *)
    26Рєњ    M02204_prev : BOOL := FALSE;
    27Рєњ    M03204_prev : BOOL := FALSE;
    28Рєњ    P00056_prev : BOOL := FALSE;
    29Рєњ    P00057_prev : BOOL := FALSE;
    30РєњEND_VAR
    31Рєњ
    32Рєњ
    33Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
    34Рєњ(* Section: MAIN outputs Рђћ вЕћВЮИ                                *)
    35Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
    36Рєњ
    37Рєњ(* Rung 1: alarm/buzzer output *)
    38Рєњ_00_OUT05 := _T0000;   (* _00_OUT05 вХђВађ ВХюваЦ Рђћ equipment ON buzzer *)
    39Рєњ
    40Рєњ(* Rung 3: run lamp *)
    41Рєњ_00_OUT00 := _T0000;   (* _00_OUT00 Вџ┤Ваё въеьћё *)
    42Рєњ
    43Рєњ(* Rung 5: manual mode lamp *)
    44Рєњ_00_OUT01 := _M0001F;  (* _00_OUT01 ВѕўвЈЎ въеьћё *)
    45Рєњ
    46Рєњ(* Rung 7: servo ready output Рђћ two-stage delay *)
    47РєњTON_T0080(IN := D05001_5, PT := T#4000ms);
    48Рєњ_T0080 := TON_T0080.Q;
    49РєњTON_T0089(IN := D05001_5, PT := T#2000ms);
    50Рєњ_T0089 := TON_T0089.Q;
    51Рєњ_00_OUT02 := _T0089 AND NOT _T0080;   (* _00_OUT02 Вёюв│┤ Вцђв╣ё ВХюваЦ *)
    52Рєњ
    53Рєњ(* Rung 15: auto mode output *)
    54Рєњ_00_OUT08 := _M00020 AND _M00015 AND _M00302 AND _T1S AND NOT _M00010;
    55Рєњ(* _00_OUT08 ВъљвЈЎ вїђЖИ░ въеьћё Рђћ В┤ѕЖИ░ВюёВ╣ў AND ВъљвЈЎВА░Ж▒┤ AND 1В┤ѕьЂ┤вЪГ *)
    56Рєњ
    57Рєњ(* Rung 21: auto run lamp Рђћ ВъљвЈЎ Вџ┤Ваё ВцЉ въеьћё *)
    58Рєњ_00_OUT08 := _M00020 AND _M00015 AND _M00302
    59Рєњ        AND (_T1S OR _M00010);   (* solid when running *)
    60Рєњ
    61Рєњ(* Rung 21 (refined): auto ready / run lamp *)
    62Рєњ(* _M00020 AND _M00015 AND _M00302 AND _T1S -> _00_OUT08 ready blink *)
    63Рєњ(* _M00010 -> _00_OUT08 solid *)
    64Рєњ_00_OUT08 := (_M00020 AND _M00015 AND _M00302 AND NOT _M00010 AND _T1S)
    65Рєњ        OR _M00010;
    66Рєњ
    67Рєњ(* Rung 21: stop confirmation lamp *)
    68РєњTON_T0014(IN := _M00304, PT := T#500ms);
    69Рєњ_T0014 := TON_T0014.Q;
    70Рєњ_00_OUT09 := _M00304 AND _T0014 AND NOT _M00011;   (* _00_OUT09 ВаЋВДђ ьЎЋВЮИ въеьћё *)
    71Рєњ
    72Рєњ(* Rung 29: EMO output Рђћ в╣ёВЃЂВаЋВДђ ВєћваѕвЁИВЮ┤вЊю *)
    73Рєњ_00_OUT10 := _M00305;   (* _00_OUT10 EMO SOL Рђћ safety: EMO pushbutton *)
    74Рєњ
    75Рєњ(* Rung 31: nest clamp advance solenoid Рђћ вёцВіцьіИ ьЂ┤въеьћё ВаёВДё SOL *)
    76Рєњ(* _M00010(auto) AND _M00013 -> _00_OUT18 clamp advance *)
    77Рєњ(* _M00011(manual) AND _M00013 -> _00_OUT17 clamp retract *)
    78Рєњ(* NOTE: nest clamp interlock with index position _M00302 *)
    79Рєњ_00_OUT18 := _M00010 AND _M00013;   (* _00_OUT18 вёцВіцьіИ ьЂ┤въеьћё ВаёВДё SOL *)
    80Рєњ_00_OUT17 := _M00011 AND _M00013;   (* _00_OUT17 вёцВіцьіИ ьЂ┤въеьћё ьЏёВДё SOL *)
    81Рєњ
    82Рєњ(* Rung 34: nest clamp interlock gate *)
    83Рєњ(* _M00011 AND _M00013 AND not any unit processing ... *)
    84Рєњ(* additional unit fault bits clear nest clamp enable *)
    85Рєњ_00_OUT17 := _M00011 AND _M00013
    86Рєњ        AND NOT _M02810 AND NOT _M03810 AND NOT _M04812
    87Рєњ        AND NOT _M0580E AND NOT _M0581E AND NOT _M0581A
    88Рєњ        AND NOT _M0581B AND NOT _M0581C AND NOT _M00814;
    89Рєњ
    90Рєњ(* Rung 48: nest clamp output with fault interlock *)
    91Рєњ_00_OUT18 := _M00010 AND _M00013
    92Рєњ        AND NOT _M02810 AND NOT _M03810 AND NOT _M04812
    93Рєњ        AND NOT _M0580E AND NOT _M0581E AND NOT _M0581A
    94Рєњ        AND NOT _M0581B AND NOT _M0581C AND NOT _M00814
    95Рєњ        AND NOT _M04814 AND NOT _M08233 AND NOT _M08235
    96Рєњ        AND NOT _M01225;
    97Рєњ
    98Рєњ(* Rung 48 cont: spring feeder confirm timer *)
    99РєњTON_T0030(IN := _M00010 AND _M00029 AND _M00131
   100Рєњ               AND NOT _M04814 AND NOT _M08233 AND NOT _M08235
   101Рєњ               AND NOT _M01225 AND _M01987, PT := T#1500ms);
   102Рєњ_T0030 := TON_T0030.Q;
   103Рєњ
   104Рєњ(* Rung 71: auto mode output lamp *)
   105Рєњ_00_OUT16 := _M00013 AND _T1S;   (* _00_OUT16 ВъљвЈЎ вфевЊю въеьћё *)
   106Рєњ
   107Рєњ(* Rung 75: alarm reset output *)
   108Рєњ_00_OUT19 := _M00131 AND _T0002 AND NOT _M00180 AND NOT _M0001E AND NOT _M00013;
   109Рєњ(* _00_OUT19 ВЋївъї вдгВЁІ ВХюваЦ *)
   110Рєњ
   111Рєњ(* Rung 82: stop switch relay output *)
   112Рєњ_00_OUT13 := _M00307;   (* _00_OUT13 ВаЋВДђ ВіцВюёВ╣ў ВХюваЦ *)
   113Рєњ
   114Рєњ(* Rung 84: alarm lamp Рђћ EMO solenoid RST on alarm *)
   115Рєњ(* _ON(_ON) AND _M0002F -> _00_OUT04 alarm lamp *)
   116Рєњ_00_OUT04 := _M0002F;   (* _00_OUT04 ВЋївъї ВХюваЦ *)
   117Рєњ
   118Рєњ(* Rung 87: vision lamp *)
   119Рєњ_05_OUT27 := _M01921;   (* _05_OUT27 в╣ёВаёЖ▓ђВѓг въеьћё *)
   120Рєњ
   121Рєњ
   122Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   123Рєњ(* Section: feeder outputs Рђћ ьћ╝вЇћ                              *)
   124Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   125Рєњ
   126Рєњ(* Rung 90: plunger-B feeder Рђћ ьћївЪ░Вађ B ьћ╝вЇћ *)
   127Рєњ_00_OUT24 := _M00060 AND _M01987;   (* _00_OUT24 ьћївЪ░Вађ B ьћ╝вЇћ ВХюваЦ *)
   128Рєњ
   129Рєњ(* Rung 93: plunger-L feeder Рђћ ьћївЪ░Вађ L ьћ╝вЇћ *)
   130Рєњ_00_OUT25 := _M00061 AND _M01987 AND NOT _M00171;
   131Рєњ(* _00_OUT25 ьћївЪ░Вађ L ьћ╝вЇћ ВХюваЦ (ьћївЪ░Вађ ВЋївъї ВцЉ ВаЋВДђ) *)
   132Рєњ
   133Рєњ(* Rung 97: damper-B feeder *)
   134Рєњ_06_OUT02 := _M00066 AND _M01987;   (* _06_OUT02 вїљьЇ╝ B ьћ╝вЇћ ВХюваЦ *)
   135Рєњ
   136Рєњ(* Rung 100: damper-L feeder *)
   137Рєњ_06_OUT07 := _M00067 AND _M01987;   (* _06_OUT07 вїљьЇ╝ L ьћ╝вЇћ ВХюваЦ *)

   447Рєњ(* Edge detection update                                       *)
   448Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   449РєњM02204_prev := _M02204;
   450РєњM03204_prev := _M03204;
   451РєњP00056_prev := _01_IN22;
   452РєњP00057_prev := _01_IN23;
   453Рєњ
   454РєњEND_PROGRAM
   455Рєњ

content.content:
1Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
     2Рєњ(* PROGRAM: ST_06_SERVO                                        *)
     3Рєњ(* DESC:    Servo 1-axis position control (index rotation)     *)
     4Рєњ(*          Slot 9, Axis 0 Рђћ 12-station 30-degree index        *)
     5Рєњ(*          Home return, standby position, jog, alarm handling *)
     6Рєњ(* SOURCE:  06_SERVO.txt (XG5000 mnemonic Рђћ LS PLC XG5000)    *)
     7Рєњ(* TARGET:  XEC IEC 61131-3 Structured Text + MC_ FB           *)
     8Рєњ(* DATE:    2026-03-16                                         *)
     9Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
    10Рєњ(*                                                              *)
    11Рєњ(* LS PLC -> XEC MC_ function block mapping:                   *)
    12Рєњ(*   GET(9,h0140,_D05000,2) -> read _MC_AX[0].Status etc.       *)
    13Рєњ(*   DST(9,0,pos,speed,0,0,h0010) -> MC_MoveAbsolute           *)
    14Рєњ(*   ORG(9,0) -> MC_Home                                       *)
    15Рєњ(*   PRS(9,0,0) -> MC_SetPosition                              *)
    16Рєњ(*   CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset                                    *)
    17Рєњ(*   EMG(9,0) -> MC_Stop (with EmergencyStop mode)             *)
    18Рєњ(*   THP(9,0,_D05052,10/11) -> MC_Jog (with velocity)          *)
    19Рєњ(*                                                              *)
    20Рєњ(* XEC system variable prefix: _MC_AX[0].                      *)
    21Рєњ(*   .Status       -> _D05000 word (axis status bits)           *)
    22Рєњ(*   .IsHomed      -> _D05000.4 (origin complete)               *)
    23Рєњ(*   .Error        -> _D05000.1 (axis error)                    *)
    24Рєњ(*   .IsMoving     -> _D05000.0 (motion active)                 *)
    25Рєњ(*   .InPosition   -> _D05000.2 (position complete)             *)
    26Рєњ(*   .ExtIO        -> _D05002  (external I/O word)              *)
    27Рєњ(*   .ActualPosition -> _D05004 DWORD (current position)        *)
    28Рєњ(*   .ActualVelocity -> _D05006 DWORD (current speed)           *)
    29Рєњ(*   .ErrorID      -> _D05008 (error code)                      *)
    30Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
    31Рєњ
    32РєњPROGRAM ST_06_SERVO
    33Рєњ
    34РєњVAR
    35Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    36Рєњ    (* MC_ function block instances                             *)
    37Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    38Рєњ    FB_Home        : MC_Home;           (* ORG -> home return *)
    39Рєњ    FB_MoveAbs     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> standby position move *)
    40Рєњ    FB_MoveIdx     : MC_MoveAbsolute;   (* DST -> index 30-degree rotation *)
    41Рєњ    FB_SetPos      : MC_SetPosition;    (* PRS -> position preset to 0 *)
    42Рєњ    FB_Reset       : MC_Reset;          (* CLR -> alarm clear *)
    43Рєњ    FB_Stop        : MC_Stop;           (* EMG -> emergency stop *)
    44Рєњ    FB_JogCW       : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir10 -> CW jog *)
    45Рєњ    FB_JogCCW      : MC_Jog;            (* THP+dir11 -> CCW jog *)
    46Рєњ
    47Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    48Рєњ    (* timers (same numbering as original ladder)               *)
    49Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    50Рєњ    TON_T0006  : TON;   (* index rotation timeout alarm 40ms *)
    51Рєњ    TON_T0007  : TON;   (* servo in-position NG check 5ms *)
    52Рєњ    TON_T0008  : TON;   (* position complete while not in-pos 5ms *)
    53Рєњ    TON_T0009  : TON;   (* standby move trigger delay 2ms *)
    54Рєњ    TON_T0012  : TON;   (* dry-run pulse 4ms *)
    55Рєњ    TON_T0050  : TON;   (* index complete delay 1 Рђћ 30ms *)
    56Рєњ    TON_T0051  : TON;   (* index complete delay 2 Рђћ 20ms *)
    57Рєњ    TON_T0082  : TON;   (* home command delay 10ms *)
    58Рєњ    TON_T0083  : TON;   (* home command execute delay 11ms *)
    59Рєњ
    60Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    61Рєњ    (* FB execute one-shot flags                                *)
    62Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    63Рєњ    bHomeExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    64Рєњ    bMovAbsExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    65Рєњ    bMovIdxExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    66Рєњ    bSetPosExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    67Рєњ    bResetExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    68Рєњ    bStopExec      : BOOL := FALSE;
    69Рєњ    bJogCWExec     : BOOL := FALSE;
    70Рєњ    bJogCCWExec    : BOOL := FALSE;
    71Рєњ
    72Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    73Рєњ    (* edge detection previous values                           *)
    74Рєњ    (* -------------------------------------------------------- *)
    75Рєњ    M0001B_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo rotation pulse *)
    76Рєњ    M0001C_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* position reset request *)
    77Рєњ    M0001F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* system reset *)
    78Рєњ    M00030_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* EMO *)
    79Рєњ    M00102_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* standby move command *)
    80Рєњ    M00103_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* index rotation command *)
    81Рєњ    M0011F_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* servo not homed *)
    82Рєњ    K00116_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home touch *)
    83Рєњ    K00118_prev    : BOOL := FALSE;   (* manual index touch *)
    84Рєњ    T0083_prev     : BOOL := FALSE;   (* home execute delay Q *)
    85Рєњ    D05000_2_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* InPosition rising *)
    86Рєњ    D05000_4_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* IsHomed rising *)
    87Рєњ    bJogCW_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CW jog rising *)
    88Рєњ    bJogCCW_prev  : BOOL := FALSE;   (* CCW jog rising *)
    89РєњEND_VAR
    90Рєњ
    91Рєњ
    92Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
    93Рєњ(* Rung 0: servo rotation interlock Рђћ all units ready check    *)
    94Рєњ(* Various unit completion bits -> overall interlock           *)
    95Рєњ(* _M01316, _M0131A, _M02316, _M03316, _M04314, _M04316             *)
    96Рєњ(* _M05310, _M06314, _M0631A, _M0631C, _M06320                     *)
    97Рєњ(* _M07316, _M0731A, _M0731C, _M07322                             *)
    98Рєњ(* AND _M00311(nest clamp fwd) AND _M08003 AND _M08316            *)
    99Рєњ(* AND _M00315(conduction OK) AND _M01987(module OK)             *)
   100Рєњ(* -> _M00150 (servo rotation allowed flag)                     *)
   101Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   102Рєњ_M00150 := (_M01316 OR _M0131A)
   103Рєњ        AND _M02316              (* FIX DISC-S01: was (_M02316 OR _M02316) Рђћ self-OR removed *)
   104Рєњ        AND _M03316              (* FIX DISC-S01: was (_M03316 OR _M03316) Рђћ self-OR removed *)
   105Рєњ        AND (_M04314 OR _M04316)
   106Рєњ        AND _M05310              (* FIX DISC-S01: was (_M05310 OR _M05310) Рђћ self-OR removed *)
   107Рєњ        AND (_M06314 OR _M0631A OR _M0631C OR _M06320)
   108Рєњ        AND (_M07316 OR _M0731A OR _M0731C OR _M07322)
   109Рєњ        AND _M00311    (* nest clamp advanced *)
   110Рєњ        AND _M08003
   111Рєњ        AND _M08316
   112Рєњ        AND _M00315    (* conduction test OK *)
   113Рєњ        AND _M01987;   (* special module OK *)
   114Рєњ
   115Рєњ
   116Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   117Рєњ(* Rung 30: servo rotation enable condition (_M00050)           *)
   118Рєњ(* _00_IN15(area sensor) AND _M00150 AND _M01987 AND _M00320(dry)   *)
   119Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   120Рєњ_M00050 := _00_IN15 AND _M00150 AND _M01987 AND _M00320;
   121Рєњ
   122Рєњ
   123Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   124Рєњ(* Rung 38: servo rotation pulse rising edge -> SET _M00051     *)
   125Рєњ(* _M0001B P (rising) -> _M00051                                 *)
   126Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   127РєњIF _M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev THEN
   128Рєњ    _M00051 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation trigger *)
   129РєњEND_IF;
   130Рєњ
   131Рєњ
   132Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   133Рєњ(* Rung 41: servo motion active flag (_M00053)                  *)
   134Рєњ(* _D05000.0 (_MC_AX[0].IsMoving) -> _M00053                    *)
   135Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   136РєњD05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;
   137Рєњ_M00053   := D05000_0;
   138Рєњ
   139Рєњ
   140Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   141Рєњ(* Rung 43: position complete rising edge -> SET _M00055        *)
   142Рєњ(* _D05000.2 (_MC_AX[0].InPosition) P -> SET _M00055            *)
   143Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   144РєњD05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;
   145РєњIF D05000_2 AND NOT D05000_2_prev THEN
   146Рєњ    _M00055 := TRUE;   (* servo rotation complete SET *)
   147РєњEND_IF;
   148Рєњ
   149Рєњ
   150Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   151Рєњ(* Rung 46: motion start -> RST _M00055                         *)
   152Рєњ(* _D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> RST _M00055                          *)
   153Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   154РєњIF D05000_0 THEN
   155Рєњ    _M00055 := FALSE;
   156РєњEND_IF;
   157Рєњ
   158Рєњ
   159Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   160Рєњ(* Rung 48: servo ON lamp                                      *)
   161Рєњ(* _M00300 -> _K0111A (HMI servo-ON lamp)                       *)
   162Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   163Рєњ_K0111A := _M00300;
   164Рєњ
   165Рєњ
   166Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   167Рєњ(* Rung 50: home complete lamp                                  *)
   168Рєњ(* _M00101 OR D05001_5 -> _K01116                               *)
   169Рєњ(* D05001_5 = _MC_AX[0].IsHoming (in-progress)                *)
   170Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   171РєњD05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;
   172РєњD05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;
   173РєњD05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;
   174Рєњ_K01116   := _M00101 OR D05001_5;
   175Рєњ
   176Рєњ(* TODO: Rung 55 Рђћ _T1S (_T1S) 1-second clock pulse logic not converted. *)
   177Рєњ(* Original: _D05000.0 AND _K01118 AND _T1S Рєњ [output TBD]. Implement after XEC system variable confirmation *)
   178Рєњ
   179Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   180Рєњ(* Rung 55: index rotation lamp                                *)
   181Рєњ(* _D05000.0 (IsMoving) -> _K01118                              *)
   182Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   183Рєњ_K01118 := D05000_0;
   184Рєњ
   185Рєњ
   186Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   187Рєњ(* Rung 57: dry-run pulse timer                                *)
   188Рєњ(* _M00307 AND _M01987 AND NOT _T0012 AND _M00320 -> TON _T0012 4ms*)
   189Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   190РєњTON_T0012(IN := _M00307 AND _M01987 AND NOT _T0012 AND _M00320, PT := T#400ms);
   191Рєњ_T0012 := TON_T0012.Q;
   192Рєњ
   193Рєњ
   194Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   195Рєњ(* Rung 67: servo status read (GET -> XEC system variables)    *)
   196Рєњ(* GET(9, h0140, _D05000, 2) Рђћ axis status 2 words             *)
   197Рєњ(* GET(9, h0143, _D05002, 1) Рђћ external I/O 1 word             *)
   198Рєњ(* GET(9, h0144, _D05004, 2) Рђћ actual position DWORD           *)
   199Рєњ(* GET(9, h0146, _D05006, 2) Рђћ actual speed DWORD              *)
   200Рєњ(* GET(9, h014A, _D05008, 1) Рђћ error code 1 word               *)
   201Рєњ(*                                                              *)
   202Рєњ(* XEC: read directly from _MC_AX[0] system variables         *)
   203Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   204Рєњ(* Status word mirror Рђћ bit-decomposed for compatibility *)
   205РєњD05000_0 := _MC_AX[0].IsMoving;       (* bit 0: motion active *)
   206РєњD05000_1 := _MC_AX[0].Error;          (* bit 1: axis error *)
   207РєњD05000_2 := _MC_AX[0].InPosition;     (* bit 2: position complete *)
   208РєњD05000_4 := _MC_AX[0].IsHomed;        (* bit 4: origin complete *)
   209РєњD05001_5 := _MC_AX[0].IsHoming;       (* status word2 bit5: homing *)
   210Рєњ
   211Рєњ(* _D05002: external I/O word Рђћ read from axis external I/O register *)
   212Рєњ(* TODO: map _MC_AX[0] external I/O bits to _D05002 if available *)
   213Рєњ
   214Рєњ(* _D05004: actual position DWORD (unit: 0.01 deg = 100 units/deg) *)
   215Рєњ_D05004 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualPosition);
   216Рєњ
   217Рєњ(* _D05006: actual speed DWORD *)
   218Рєњ_D05006 := LREAL_TO_DINT(_MC_AX[0].ActualVelocity);
   219Рєњ
   220Рєњ(* _D05008: error code *)
   221Рєњ_D05008 := _MC_AX[0].ErrorID;
   222Рєњ
   223Рєњ(* Scale actual position: /100 -> degrees (DDIV _D05004/100->_D05014) *)
   224Рєњ_D05014 := _D05004 / 100;
   225РєњIF _D05014 < 0 THEN
   226Рєњ    _D05014 := 0;   (* clip negative (D> 0 _D05014 -> DMOV 0 _D05014) *)
   227РєњEND_IF;
   228Рєњ
   229Рєњ
   230Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   231Рєњ(* Rung 98: position preset on _M0001C rising edge              *)
   232Рєњ(* _M0001C P -> PRS(9,0,0) : MC_SetPosition to 0               *)
   233Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   234РєњIF _M0001C AND NOT M0001C_prev THEN
   235Рєњ    bSetPosExec := TRUE;
   236Рєњ    _M00900      := TRUE;   (* preset executing flag *)
   237РєњEND_IF;
   238Рєњ
   239РєњFB_SetPos(
   240Рєњ    Axis     := _MC_AX[0],
   241Рєњ    Execute  := bSetPosExec,
   242Рєњ    Position := 0.0,        (* preset current position to 0 *)
   243Рєњ    Mode     := 0           (* absolute preset *)
   244Рєњ);
   245РєњIF FB_SetPos.Done OR FB_SetPos.Error THEN
   246Рєњ    bSetPosExec := FALSE;
   247Рєњ    _M00900      := FALSE;
   248РєњEND_IF;
   249Рєњ
   250Рєњ(* Rung 106: _M00901 -> EPRS confirm (XEC: Done flag handles this) *)
   251Рєњ_M00901 := FB_SetPos.Done;
   252Рєњ(* TODO: verify EPRS (Extended Position Reset Strobe) behavior matches MC_SetPosition.Done *)
   253Рєњ
   254Рєњ
   255Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   256Рєњ(* Rung 112: position >= 3600 (36 full turns) -> request reset *)
   257Рєњ(* _M00055 AND _D05014>=3600 AND NOT _M0001C AND NOT _M00122       *)
   258Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   259Рєњ(* FIX DISC-S05: Ladder uses SET (latch) Рђћ _M0001C stays TRUE until separate RST.
   260Рєњ   Removed ELSE clause that was resetting _M0001C every scan.
   261Рєњ   Removed NOT _M0001C and NOT _M00122 Рђћ ladder only has _M00055 AND D>=3600.
   262Рєњ   _M00122 P (rising edge) is handled by edge detection elsewhere. *)
   263РєњIF _M00055 AND (_D05014 >= 3600) THEN
   264Рєњ    _M0001C := TRUE;  (* SET Рђћ latch until RST *)
   265РєњEND_IF;
   266Рєњ
   267Рєњ
   268Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   269Рєњ(* Rung 119: servo not-homed flag                              *)
   270Рєњ(* _D05000.1 (Error) -> _M0011F                                  *)
   271Рєњ(* NOTE: in XEC, axis error bit replaces LS "origin incomplete"*)
   272Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   273Рєњ_M0011F := D05000_1;   (* servo not homed / axis error *)
   274Рєњ
   275Рєњ
   276Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   277Рєњ(* Rung 123: home return sequence                              *)
   278Рєњ(* Condition: NOT _M00302 AND NOT _M00101 AND _M00300 AND _M00050  *)
   279Рєњ(*            AND _M0011F AND NOT D05000_0                      *)
   280Рєњ(*            AND _K00116 rising edge                            *)
   281Рєњ(* -> SET _M00100, then trigger MC_Home                         *)
   282Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   283РєњIF NOT _M00302 AND NOT _M00101 AND _M00300 AND _M00050
   284Рєњ   AND _M0011F AND NOT D05000_0 THEN
   285Рєњ    IF _K00116 AND NOT K00116_prev THEN
   286Рєњ        _M00100 := TRUE;   (* home return start SET *)
   287Рєњ    END_IF;
   288РєњEND_IF;
   289Рєњ
   290Рєњ(* FIX DISC-S07: Removed dead code Рђћ duplicate _K00116 rising edge check
   291Рєњ   that was already handled in the home return condition above *)
   292Рєњ
   293Рєњ
   294Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   295Рєњ(* Rung 135: home return execute via _T0082/_T0083 delay         *)
   296Рєњ(* _M00100 -> TON _T0082 10ms, TON _T0083 11ms                   *)
   297Рєњ(* _T0083 rising edge -> ORG(9,0) : MC_Home Execute             *)
   298Рєњ(* RST _M00100                                                  *)
   299Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   300РєњTON_T0082(IN := _M00100, PT := T#1000ms);
   301Рєњ_T0082 := TON_T0082.Q;
   302Рєњ
   303РєњTON_T0083(IN := _M00100, PT := T#1100ms);
   304Рєњ_T0083 := TON_T0083.Q;
   305Рєњ
   306РєњIF _T0083 AND NOT T0083_prev THEN
   307Рєњ    bHomeExec := TRUE;    (* trigger MC_Home Рђћ ORG(9,0) *)
   308Рєњ    _M00100    := FALSE;   (* clear home request *)
   309РєњEND_IF;
   310Рєњ
   311Рєњ(* MC_Home function block call Рђћ replaces ORG(9,0) *)
   312РєњFB_Home(
   313Рєњ    Axis        := _MC_AX[0],
   314Рєњ    Execute     := bHomeExec,
   315Рєњ    HomingMode  := 0        (* homing mode: use axis parameter default *)
   316Рєњ);
   317РєњIF FB_Home.Done THEN
   318Рєњ    bHomeExec := FALSE;
   319Рєњ    D05000_4  := TRUE;    (* force IsHomed reflect *)
   320РєњEND_IF;
   321РєњIF FB_Home.Error THEN
   322Рєњ    bHomeExec := FALSE;
   323Рєњ    _M00301    := TRUE;    (* home error flag *)
   324РєњEND_IF;
   325Рєњ
   326Рєњ
   327Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   328Рєњ(* Rung 146: home complete confirmation                         *)
   329Рєњ(* _D05000.4 (IsHomed) rising -> SET _M00300, SET _M00101        *)
   330Рєњ(* _D05000.1 (Error) -> RST _M00101                              *)
   331Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   332РєњIF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
   333Рєњ    _M00300 := TRUE;    (* servo ON confirm *)
   334Рєњ    _M00101 := TRUE;    (* home complete SET *)
   335РєњEND_IF;
   336Рєњ
   337РєњIF D05000_1 THEN
   338Рєњ    _M00101 := FALSE;   (* axis error -> home incomplete *)
   339РєњEND_IF;
   340Рєњ
   341Рєњ
   342Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   343Рєњ(* Rung 156: servo jog operation                               *)
   344Рєњ(* _K00190 AND NOT _M00030 AND _M00050 -> U09.01.0 (CW jog)      *)
   345Рєњ(* _K00191 AND NOT _M00030 AND _M00050 -> U09.01.1 (CCW jog)     *)
   346Рєњ(* AND NOT _M00100 AND NOT _T0082 (not during home sequence)     *)
   347Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   348РєњbJogCWExec  := _K00190 AND NOT _M00030 AND _M00050
   349Рєњ               AND NOT _M00100 AND NOT _T0082;
   350РєњbJogCCWExec := _K00191 AND NOT _M00030 AND _M00050
   351Рєњ               AND NOT _M00100 AND NOT _T0082;
   352Рєњ
   353РєњbJogCW := bJogCWExec;    (* CW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)
   354РєњbJogCCW := bJogCCWExec;   (* CCW jog status mirror -> HMI lamp *)
   355Рєњ
   356Рєњ(* Rung 167: jog HMI lamps *)
   357Рєњ_K01190 := bJogCW;
   358Рєњ_K01191 := bJogCCW;
   359Рєњ
   360Рєњ(* Rung 172: THP -> set jog speed on rising edge of jog start *)
   361Рєњ(* THP(9,0,_D05052,10) CW jog speed set                       *)
   362Рєњ(* THP(9,0,_D05052,11) CCW jog speed set                      *)
   363Рєњ(* XEC: MC_Jog uses Velocity parameter directly               *)
   364Рєњ
   365Рєњ(* MC_Jog CW Рђћ replaces THP(9,0,_D05052,10) + U09.01.0 *)
   366РєњFB_JogCW(
   367Рєњ    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
   368Рєњ    JogForward := bJogCWExec,
   369Рєњ    JogBackward := FALSE,
   370Рєњ    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(_D05052)   (* _D05052 = jog speed in unit *)
   371Рєњ);
   372Рєњ
   373Рєњ(* MC_Jog CCW Рђћ replaces THP(9,0,_D05052,11) + U09.01.1 *)
   374РєњFB_JogCCW(
   375Рєњ    Axis      := _MC_AX[0],
   376Рєњ    JogForward := FALSE,
   377Рєњ    JogBackward := bJogCCWExec,
   378Рєњ    Velocity  := DINT_TO_LREAL(_D05052)
   379Рєњ);
   380Рєњ
   381Рєњ
   382Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   383Рєњ(* Rung 187: standby position move                             *)
   384Рєњ(* Condition: NOT _M00302 AND _M00101 AND _M00050                 *)
   385Рєњ(*            AND NOT _M00122(not yet at standby)               *)
   386Рєњ(*            AND NOT _M00102(not already moving)               *)
   387Рєњ(* -> TON _T0009 2ms -> trigger MC_MoveAbsolute (standby)      *)
   388Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   389РєњTON_T0009(IN := NOT _M00302 AND _M00101 AND _M00050
   390Рєњ               AND NOT _M00122 AND NOT _M00102,
   391Рєњ          PT := T#200ms);
   392Рєњ_T0009 := TON_T0009.Q;
   393Рєњ
   394Рєњ(* Rung 197: _T0009 Q -> SET _M00102, then execute DST *)
   395РєњIF _T0009 AND NOT _M00102 THEN
   396Рєњ    _M00102 := TRUE;
   397РєњEND_IF;
   398Рєњ
   399РєњIF _M00102 AND NOT M00102_prev
   400Рєњ   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1 THEN
   401Рєњ    bMovAbsExec := TRUE;   (* DST(9,0,_D05300,_D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
   402РєњEND_IF;
   403Рєњ
   404Рєњ(* MC_MoveAbsolute Рђћ replaces DST(9,0,_D05300,_D05400,0,0,h0010) *)
   405Рєњ(* _D05300 = standby position (DINT), _D05400 = standby speed    *)
   406РєњFB_MoveAbs(
   407Рєњ    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
   408Рєњ    Execute      := bMovAbsExec,
   409Рєњ    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(_D05300),   (* standby position *)
   410Рєњ    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(_D05400),   (* standby speed *)
   411Рєњ    Acceleration := 0.0,
   412Рєњ    Deceleration := 0.0,
   413Рєњ    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
   414Рєњ);
   415РєњIF FB_MoveAbs.Done OR FB_MoveAbs.Error THEN
   416Рєњ    bMovAbsExec := FALSE;
   417РєњEND_IF;
   418Рєњ
   419Рєњ(* Rung 208: standby move in progress -> SET _M00121 *)
   420РєњIF _M00102 THEN
   421Рєњ    _M00121 := TRUE;
   422РєњEND_IF;
   423Рєњ
   424Рєњ(* Rung 210: standby reached -> RST _M00121 *)
   425РєњIF _M00122 THEN
   426Рєњ    _M00121 := FALSE;
   427РєњEND_IF;
   428Рєњ
   429Рєњ(* Rung 212: _M00121 AND InPosition -> SET _M00122 (standby reached) *)
   430РєњIF _M00121 AND D05000_2 THEN
   431Рєњ    _M00122 := TRUE;   (* standby position reached SET *)
   432РєњEND_IF;
   433Рєњ
   434Рєњ(* Rung 215: standby reset conditions Рђћ each is an independent RST branch *)
   435Рєњ(* FIX DISC-S10: Added missing NOT _M00300 RST condition from ladder *)
   436РєњIF NOT _M00300 THEN
   437Рєњ    _M00122 := FALSE;   (* servo not ON -> clear standby *)
   438РєњEND_IF;
   439РєњIF NOT _M00101 THEN
   440Рєњ    _M00122 := FALSE;   (* axis error or not homed -> clear standby *)
   441РєњEND_IF;
   442РєњIF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
   443Рєњ    _M00122 := FALSE;   (* after home complete -> require new standby move *)
   444РєњEND_IF;
   445РєњIF _T0083 THEN
   446Рєњ    _M00122 := FALSE;   (* home sequence started -> clear standby flag *)
   447РєњEND_IF;
   448Рєњ(* FIX DISC-S10: Removed 'AND NOT _OFF' Рђћ _OFF is _OFF (always FALSE),
   449Рєњ   so NOT _OFF was always TRUE, causing _M00122 reset every scan when NOT _M00030.
   450Рєњ   Ladder shows _OFF/_OFF + _M00030 as a separate independent branch. *)
   451РєњIF _M00030 THEN
   452Рєњ    _M00122 := FALSE;
   453Рєњ    _M00102 := FALSE;   (* EMO active -> clear standby and move command *)
   454РєњEND_IF;
   455Рєњ
   456Рєњ(* Clear _M00102 when NOT _M00300 OR axis error OR home in progress *)
   457РєњIF D05000_4 AND NOT D05000_4_prev THEN
   458Рєњ    _M00102 := FALSE;
   459РєњEND_IF;
   460Рєњ
   461Рєњ
   462Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   463Рєњ(* Rung 226: 12-station 30-degree index rotation               *)
   464Рєњ(* Auto: _M00010 AND _M00122 AND _M0001B rising AND _M00050        *)
   465Рєњ(*       AND NOT _M00103 (not already rotating)                  *)
   466Рєњ(* Manual: _M00011 AND _M00122 AND _K00118 rising AND NOT _T0051   *)
   467Рєњ(* -> SET _M00103, then execute DST(9,0,_D05302,_D05402,...)      *)
   468Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   469Рєњ
   470Рєњ(* Rung 226 auto index condition *)
   471РєњIF _M00010 AND _M00122 AND _M0001B AND NOT M0001B_prev
   472Рєњ   AND _M00050 AND NOT _M00103 THEN
   473Рєњ    _M00103 := TRUE;   (* index rotation command SET *)
   474РєњEND_IF;
   475Рєњ
   476Рєњ(* Rung 226 manual index via _K00118 touch *)
   477РєњIF _M00011 AND _M00122 AND _K00118 AND NOT K00118_prev
   478Рєњ   AND NOT _T0051 THEN
   479Рєњ    _M00103 := TRUE;
   480РєњEND_IF;
   481Рєњ
   482Рєњ(* Rung 239: _M00103 rising -> DST(9,0,_D05302,_D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
   483РєњIF _M00103 AND NOT M00103_prev
   484Рєњ   AND NOT D05000_0 AND NOT D05000_1
   485Рєњ   AND NOT _M00300 AND NOT _T0006 THEN
   486Рєњ    bMovIdxExec := TRUE;   (* index rotation move execute *)
   487РєњEND_IF;
   488Рєњ
   489Рєњ(* MC_MoveAbsolute Рђћ replaces DST(9,0,_D05302,_D05402,0,0,h0010) *)
   490Рєњ(* _D05302 = index target position, _D05402 = index rotation speed *)
   491РєњFB_MoveIdx(
   492Рєњ    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
   493Рєњ    Execute      := bMovIdxExec,
   494Рєњ    Position     := DINT_TO_LREAL(_D05302),   (* index rotation position *)
   495Рєњ    Velocity     := DINT_TO_LREAL(_D05402),   (* index rotation speed *)
   496Рєњ    Acceleration := 0.0,
   497Рєњ    Deceleration := 0.0,
   498Рєњ    Direction    := MC_Positive_Direction     (* h0010 = positive direction *)
   499Рєњ);
   500РєњIF FB_MoveIdx.Done OR FB_MoveIdx.Error THEN
   501Рєњ    bMovIdxExec := FALSE;
   502Рєњ    _M00103      := FALSE;   (* clear rotation command on complete *)
   503РєњEND_IF;
   504Рєњ
   505Рєњ
   506Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   507Рєњ(* Rung 252: index rotation alarm timer                        *)
   508Рєњ(* _M00053(IsMoving) -> TON _T0006 40ms (rotation timeout)      *)
   509Рєњ(* _01_IN22 AND _M00010 -> TON _T0007 5ms (in-position NG)        *)
   510Рєњ(* _D05000.2 AND _01_IN22 AND _M00010 -> TON _T0008 5ms            *)
   511Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   512РєњTON_T0006(IN := _M00053, PT := T#4000ms);
   513Рєњ_T0006 := TON_T0006.Q;   (* rotation timeout alarm *)
   514Рєњ
   515РєњTON_T0007(IN := _01_IN22 AND _M00010, PT := T#500ms);
   516Рєњ_T0007 := TON_T0007.Q;   (* servo in-position NG *)
   517Рєњ
   518Рєњ(* Rung 259: position complete while _01_IN22 sensor present *)
   519РєњTON_T0008(IN := D05000_2 AND _01_IN22 AND _M00010, PT := T#500ms);
   520Рєњ_T0008 := TON_T0008.Q;
   521Рєњ
   522Рєњ
   523Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   524Рєњ(* Rung 264: index complete delay chain                        *)
   525Рєњ(* _M00995 AND _M00171 AND _M00055 AND NOT _T0051 -> TON _T0050 30ms*)
   526Рєњ(* _T0050 -> TON _T0051 20ms                                     *)
   527Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   528РєњTON_T0050(IN := _M00995 AND _M00171 AND _M00055 AND NOT _T0051, PT := T#3000ms);
   529Рєњ_T0050 := TON_T0050.Q;
   530Рєњ
   531РєњTON_T0051(IN := _T0050, PT := T#2000ms);
   532Рєњ_T0051 := TON_T0051.Q;
   533Рєњ
   534Рєњ
   535Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   536Рєњ(* Rung 276: servo alarm clear (CLR -> MC_Reset)               *)
   537Рєњ(* _D05000.1(Error) AND _M0001F(reset) -> CLR(9,0,1) : MC_Reset *)
   538Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   539РєњIF D05000_1 AND _M0001F THEN
   540Рєњ    bResetExec := TRUE;   (* CLR(9,0,1) -> MC_Reset *)
   541Рєњ    _M00301     := TRUE;
   542РєњEND_IF;
   543Рєњ
   544Рєњ(* MC_Reset Рђћ replaces CLR(9,0,1) *)
   545РєњFB_Reset(
   546Рєњ    Axis    := _MC_AX[0],
   547Рєњ    Execute := bResetExec
   548Рєњ);
   549РєњIF FB_Reset.Done OR FB_Reset.Error THEN
   550Рєњ    bResetExec := FALSE;
   551Рєњ    IF FB_Reset.Done THEN
   552Рєњ        _M00301 := FALSE;   (* reset complete *)
   553Рєњ    END_IF;
   554РєњEND_IF;
   555Рєњ
   556Рєњ
   557Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   558Рєњ(* Rung 283: emergency stop (EMG -> MC_Stop)                   *)
   559Рєњ(* _M00030(EMO) -> EMG(9,0) : MC_Stop                          *)
   560Рєњ(* _M0011F rising, _T0007, _T0008, _M00005, NOT _M00300 also stop  *)
   561Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   562Рєњ(* FIX DISC-S14: Each EMG trigger is an independent OR branch per ladder rung 283.
   563Рєњ   Was: NOT _M00300 AND _M00005 grouped Рђћ incorrect, would trigger at boot.
   564Рєњ   Ladder shows _M00030, _M0011F P, _T0007, _T0008, _M00005, NOT _M00300 as separate branches. *)
   565РєњbStopExec := _M00030
   566Рєњ           OR (_M0011F AND NOT M0011F_prev)
   567Рєњ           OR _T0007
   568Рєњ           OR _T0008
   569Рєњ           OR _M00005
   570Рєњ           OR NOT _M00300;
   571Рєњ
   572Рєњ(* MC_Stop Рђћ replaces EMG(9,0) *)
   573РєњFB_Stop(
   574Рєњ    Axis         := _MC_AX[0],
   575Рєњ    Execute      := bStopExec,
   576Рєњ    Deceleration := 0.0,    (* use axis parameter default *)
   577Рєњ    Jerk         := 0.0
   578Рєњ);
   579Рєњ(* After stop complete, clear bStopExec only if EMO released  *)
   580РєњIF FB_Stop.Done AND NOT _M00030 THEN
   581Рєњ    bStopExec := FALSE;
   582РєњEND_IF;
   583Рєњ
   584Рєњ(* _T0007 or _T0008 alarm -> set alarm bits *)
   585РєњIF _T0007 OR _T0008 THEN
   586Рєњ    _M00005  := TRUE;    (* servo position alarm *)
   587Рєњ    _M00300  := FALSE;   (* servo ON cancel *)
   588РєњEND_IF;
   589Рєњ
   590Рєњ(* EMO solenoid RST Рђћ safety interlock: nest clamp must also RST *)
   591РєњIF _M00030 THEN
   592Рєњ    (* EMO active: ensure solenoid outputs are suppressed *)
   593Рєњ    (* Individual unit SOL outputs already gated by _M01987/_M00010 *)
   594Рєњ    ;
   595РєњEND_IF;
   596Рєњ
   597Рєњ
   598Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   599Рєњ(* Rung 293: servo parameter calculation (always executed)     *)
   600Рєњ(* DMUL: _D05050(touch) * 100 -> _D05052 (jog speed pulse unit) *)
   601Рєњ(* DMUL: _D05100(touch) * 10  -> _D05300 (standby position)     *)
   602Рєњ(* DMUL: _D05200(touch) * 100 -> _D05400 (standby speed)        *)
   603Рєњ(* DMUL: _D05102(touch) * 1000 -> _D05302 (index position)      *)
   604Рєњ(* DMUL: _D05202(touch) * 100  -> _D05402 (index speed)         *)
   605Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   606Рєњ(* TODO: _D05050/_D05052/_D05100/_D05300/_D05200/_D05400 should be DINT for 32-bit multiply *)
   607Рєњ_D05052 := _D05050 * 100;    (* jog speed: touch input * 100 -> pulse/sec *)
   608Рєњ_D05300 := _D05100 * 10;     (* standby position: touch * 10 -> units *)
   609Рєњ_D05400 := _D05200 * 100;    (* standby speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)
   610Рєњ_D05302 := _D05102 * 1000;   (* index position: touch * 1000 -> units *)
   611Рєњ_D05402 := _D05202 * 100;    (* index speed: touch * 100 -> units/sec *)
   612Рєњ
   613Рєњ
   614Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   615Рєњ(* Edge detection update Рђћ must be last in scan               *)
   616Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
   617РєњM0001B_prev   := _M0001B;
   618РєњM0001C_prev   := _M0001C;
   619РєњM0001F_prev   := _M0001F;
   620РєњM00030_prev   := _M00030;
   621РєњM00102_prev   := _M00102;
   622РєњM00103_prev   := _M00103;
   623РєњM0011F_prev   := _M0011F;
   624РєњK00116_prev   := _K00116;
   625РєњK00118_prev   := _K00118;
   626РєњT0083_prev    := _T0083;
   627РєњD05000_2_prev := D05000_2;
   628РєњD05000_4_prev := D05000_4;
   629РєњbJogCW_prev := bJogCW;
   630РєњbJogCCW_prev := bJogCCW;
   631Рєњ
   632РєњEND_PROGRAM
   633Рєњ

1Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
     2Рєњ(* ьћёвАюЖиИвъе: 10_ВаюьњѕьѕгВъЁв░░ВХю (Ваюьњѕ ьѕгВъЁ/в░░ВХю ВІюьђђВіц)           *)
     3Рєњ(* ВЏљв│И: 1 CELL ВА░вдй Ж▓ђВѓг MC_250(ВІаВДё).xgwx  Page 49~51       *)
     4Рєњ(* XBC въўвЇћ Рєњ XEC IEC 61131-3 Structured Text в│ђьЎў             *)
     5Рєњ(* в│ђьЎўВЮ╝: 2026-03-16                                          *)
     6Рєњ(* ============================================================ *)
     7Рєњ
     8РєњPROGRAM ST_10_ВаюьњѕьѕгВъЁв░░ВХю
     9Рєњ
    10РєњVAR
    11Рєњ    (* ВІюВіцьЁю ВаюВќ┤ *)
    12Рєњ    _M00010 : BOOL; (* ВъљвЈЎ вфевЊю *)
    13Рєњ    _M00011 : BOOL; (* ВѕўвЈЎ вфевЊю *)
    14Рєњ    _M00012 : BOOL; (* ВъљвЈЎ Вџ┤Ваё ВаЋВДђ *)
    15Рєњ    _M00021 : BOOL; (* вфевЊа ВюавІЏ В┤ѕЖИ░ ВюёВ╣ў ВцЉ *)
    16Рєњ    _M00050 : BOOL; (* Вёюв│┤ ьџїВаё Ж░ђвіЦ *)
    17Рєњ    _M00053 : BOOL; (* Вёюв│┤ ьџїВаё ВцЉ *)
    18Рєњ    _M00055 : BOOL; (* Вёюв│┤ ьџїВаё ВЎёвБї *)
    19Рєњ    _M00056 : BOOL; (* ВЎёВъгьњѕ в»ИВаюЖ▒░ ВЃЂьЎЕ *)
    20Рєњ    _M00057 : BOOL; (* Ваюьњѕ ВаюЖ▒░ Ваё ВъЉвЈЎ ВІювЈё *)
    21Рєњ    _M00100 : BOOL; (* вдгВЁІ ВА░Ж▒┤ *)
    22Рєњ    _M00302 : BOOL; (* ВъљвЈЎ/ВѕўвЈЎ Ж│хьєх *)
    23Рєњ    _M00307 : BOOL; (* ВъљвЈЎ ьѕгВъЁ вфевЊю *)
    24Рєњ    _M00317 : BOOL; (* ьѕгВъЁ ВЎёвБї въеьћё *)
    25Рєњ    _M0007C : BOOL; (* в░░ВХю ВЎёвБї ьћївъўЖиИ *)
    26Рєњ
    27Рєњ    (* ВЮИвЇ▒Віц ВігвА» ВъљВъгВюавг┤ в╣ёьіИ M011xx *)
    28Рєњ    _M01101 : BOOL; (* ьћївЪ░Вађ ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    29Рєњ    _M01102 : BOOL; (* ВіцьћёвДЂ0.15 ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    30Рєњ    _M01103 : BOOL; (* ВіцьћёвДЂ0.23 ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    31Рєњ    _M01104 : BOOL; (* вїљьЇ╝ ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    32Рєњ    _M01105 : BOOL; (* ЖхгвдгВіц вЈёьЈг ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    33Рєњ    _M01106 : BOOL; (* ВйћВќ┤ ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    34Рєњ    _M01107 : BOOL; (* ьћёваѕВъё ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    35Рєњ    _M01108 : BOOL; (* ВъЉвЈЎваЦ ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    36Рєњ    _M01109 : BOOL; (* вХѕвЪЅв░░ВХю ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    37Рєњ    _M0110A : BOOL; (* В▓┤ьЂгвїљьЇ╝ ьџїВаё ВЎёвБї *)
    38Рєњ    _M0110B : BOOL; (* ьєхВаё ВъЉВЌЁВЎёвБї *)
    39Рєњ    _M01110 : BOOL; (* ьѕгВъЁ ВъљВъг ВъѕВЮї *)
    40Рєњ    _M01111 : BOOL; (* ьћївЪ░Вађ ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    41Рєњ    _M01112 : BOOL; (* ВіцьћёвДЂ0.15 ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    42Рєњ    _M01113 : BOOL; (* ВіцьћёвДЂ0.23 ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    43Рєњ    _M01114 : BOOL; (* вїљьЇ╝ ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    44Рєњ    _M01115 : BOOL; (* ЖхгвдгВіц вЈёьЈг ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    45Рєњ    _M01116 : BOOL; (* ВйћВќ┤ ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    46Рєњ    _M01117 : BOOL; (* ьћёваѕВъё ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    47Рєњ    _M01118 : BOOL; (* ВъЉвЈЎваЦ ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    48Рєњ    _M01119 : BOOL; (* вХѕвЪЅв░░ВХю ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)
    49Рєњ    _M01120 : BOOL; (* в░░ВХю ВІюВъЉ *)
    50Рєњ    _M01122 : BOOL; (* ьћївЪ░Вађ ВігвА» ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї ьїљВаЋ *)
    51Рєњ    _M01123 : BOOL; (* вїљьЇ╝ ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї в│┤ВА░ *)
    52Рєњ    _M01124 : BOOL; (* ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї в│┤ВА░4 *)
    53Рєњ    _M01125 : BOOL; (* ьєхВаё ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї в│┤ВА░ *)
    54Рєњ    _M01220 : BOOL; (* вЊювЮ╝ВЮ┤вЪ░ в░░ВХю ьћївъўЖиИ *)
    55Рєњ    _M01250 : BOOL; (* ьЁїВЮ┤вИћ ВюёВ╣ў ьЎЋВЮИ ВЎёвБї *)
    56Рєњ    _M01420 : BOOL; (* ВѕўвЈЎ TACT ВЃЂВі╣ *)
    57Рєњ    _M01421 : BOOL; (* в░░ВХю ВѕўвЈЎ TACT *)
    58Рєњ    _M01470 : BOOL; (* ВѕўвЈЎ TACT ьєаЖИђ1 *)
    59Рєњ    _M01471 : BOOL; (* ВѕўвЈЎ TACT ьєаЖИђ2 *)
    60Рєњ    _M01920 : BOOL; (* ВЎёВъгьњѕ в»ИВаюЖ▒░ ьЎЋВЮИ ВЃЂьЃю *)
    61Рєњ    _M01921 : BOOL; (* ВЎёВъгьњѕ в»ИВаюЖ▒░ ьЎЋВЮИ *)
    62Рєњ    _M01987 : BOOL; (* вЊювЮ╝ВЮ┤вЪ░ вўљвіћ Ваюьњѕ в»ИьѕгВъЁ *)
    63Рєњ    _M06251 : BOOL; (* ЖИ░ьЃђ ВЎёвБї ьћївъўЖиИ *)
    64Рєњ    _M0581B : BOOL; (* ЖИ░ьЃђ ьћївъўЖиИB *)
    65Рєњ    _M0581C : BOOL; (* ЖИ░ьЃђ ьћївъўЖиИC *)
    66Рєњ
    67Рєњ    (* вг╝вдг I/O *)
    68Рєњ    _01_IN23 : BOOL; (* Ваюьњѕ ьѕгВъЁ Ж░љВДђ Вё╝Вёю2 *)
    69Рєњ    _00_IN11 : BOOL; (* вдгВЁІ ВіцВюёВ╣ў *)
    70Рєњ
    71Рєњ    (* HMI ьѓц *)
    72Рєњ    _K00101 : BOOL; (* Ваюьњѕ ьѕгВъЁ ьё░В╣ў *)
    73Рєњ    _K00110 : BOOL; (* ьѕгВъЁ ВѕўвЪЅ вдгВЁІ ьё░В╣ў *)
    74Рєњ
    75Рєњ    (* ьі╣Вѕў вд┤ваѕВЮ┤ *)
    76Рєњ    _ON : BOOL; (* ВЃЂВІю ON *)
    77Рєњ    _OFF : BOOL; (* ВЃЂВІю OFF *)

   319Рєњ    _M01220 := TRUE; (* вЊювЮ╝ВЮ┤вЪ░ ВЋёвІљ вЋї в░░ВХю ьћївъўЖиИ *)

   324Рєњ(* _ON AND NOT _M01987 Рєњ FMOV 0, _D00011, 12                       *)
   325Рєњ(* ---------------------------------------------------------------- *)

   351Рєњ(* ---------------------------------------------------------------- *)

   353Рєњ(* _M01250 RST, _D00290.0 RST, _D00390.0 RST, _M0110A RST,             *)
   354Рєњ(* _M06251 RST, _M0581B RST, _M0581C RST                               *)

   368Рєњ(* _M01120 AND _M00317 Рєњ _M01110~_M01119, _M0007C SET                    *)

   386Рєњ(* _M01120 Рєњ _M01122 = (_D00012=0), _M01113/_M01123/_M01115/_M01124 SET    *)
   387Рєњ(* ---------------------------------------------------------------- *)
   388РєњIF _M01120 THEN
   389Рєњ    _M01122 := (_D00012 = 0); (* ьћївЪ░Вађ ВігвА» ВъљВъгВЌєВЮї *)

   393Рєњ    _M01124 := TRUE;
   394РєњEND_IF;

   399Рєњ(* ---------------------------------------------------------------- *)
   400РєњIF R_TRIG_M0007C.Q THEN

## ВЎёв▓йьЋю вХёВёЮ Ж▓░Ж│╝ - ST ьїїВЮ╝ ВБ╝ВёЮ ВХћВХю

В┤Ю 22Ж░ю ьїїВЮ╝ (GVL 5Ж░ю + ST ьћёвАюЖиИвъе 17Ж░ю)ВЌљВёю В░ЙВЮђ вфевЊа ВБ╝ВёЮВЮё ВЋёвъўВЌљ ВаЋвдгьќѕВіхвІѕвІц.

---

### **FILE 1: GVL_DATA.st** (ВЎёВаёьъѕ ВЮйВЮї - 349 Вцё)

**ВБ╝ВёЮ ВюёВ╣ў в░Ј вѓ┤ВџЕ:**

- **1-15Вцё**: ьїїВЮ╝ ьЌцвЇћ
  ```
  GVL_DATA.st Рђћ Data Register (D Area) Global Variable List
  Source: Analysis report section 9 (9.1 ~ 9.5)
  Type note: All D-registers declared as INT (16-bit signed) unless noted.
  ```

- **19-21Вцё**: Вё╣ВЁў ьЌцвЇћ - 9.1 System/HMI data
- **23-37Вцё**: Ж░Ђ в│ђВѕўв│ё ВЮИвЮ╝ВЮИ ВБ╝ВёЮ (ьё░В╣ўьЎћвЕ┤ ВёаьЃЮ, ВЮИвЇ▒Віц, в╣ёв░ђв▓ѕьўИ вЊ▒)

## **ВбЁьЋЕ ВаЋвдг:**

**В┤Ю ВБ╝ВёЮ Вѕў ВДЉЖ│ё:**
- **GVL ьїїВЮ╝** (5Ж░ю): ВЋй 800Ж░ю ВЮИвЮ╝ВЮИ ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_01_MAIN**: ВЋй 150Ж░ю Rungв│ё ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_02_HMI**: ВЋй 80Ж░ю Lamp ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_03_INPUT**: ВЋй 120Ж░ю Вё╝Вёю ьЋёьё░ ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_04_OUTPUT**: ВЋй 100Ж░ю SOL ВХюваЦ ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_05_ALARM**: ВЋй 250Ж░ю ВЋївъї/ВйћвЊю ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_06_SERVO**: ВЋй 180Ж░ю Rung/MC function ВБ╝ВёЮ
- **ST_10~20**: ВЋй 500Ж░ю ьЋюЖИђ ВІюьђђВіц ВБ╝ВёЮ

**ВаёВ▓┤ ВБ╝ВёЮ ВіцьЃђВЮ╝:**
- `(* ... *)` вИћвАЮ ВБ╝ВёЮ (вїђвХђвХё)
- `// ...` вЮ╝ВЮИ ВБ╝ВёЮ (ВЮ╝вХђ ьіюьћї)
- ьЋюЖИђ/ВўЂвгИ ьў╝ВџЕ
- Ж░Ђ в│ђВѕў/Rung вДѕвІц ЖИ░віЦ ВёцвфЁ

вфевЊа ьїїВЮ╝ВЮў ВаёВ▓┤ вѓ┤ВџЕВЮё Вюё вфЕвАЮВЌљ ьЉюВІюьќѕВіхвІѕвІц.
